flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Pierpont Community and Technical College fell 29% between 2006 and 2009 (11.4% → 8.1%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 20% at Pierpont Community and Technical College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (906 vs 1.1k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Pierpont Community and Technical College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.1k → $5.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Pierpont Community and Technical College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($12.1k → $13.7k).
